hero.title: Understanding QS Tokenomics
hero.description: Learn how QS tokens power the Quantum Shield ecosystem through voting escrow and decentralized governance.

qs.title: What is QS Token?
qs.description: QS is the native utility token of Quantum Shield protocol. It enables governance participation, staking rewards, and access to premium features.

veqs.title: What is veQS?
veqs.description: veQS (voting escrow QS) is a non-transferable token representing your governance power. The longer you lock QS, the more veQS you receive.
veqs.formulaDescription: Your veQS amount is calculated based on how long you lock your QS tokens. Maximum lock period is 4 years for 1:1 ratio.
veqs.examplesAriaLabel: Lock period examples showing veQS calculation
veqs.tableNote: Examples based on locking 10,000 QS tokens

acquire.description: Get QS tokens from DEX or rewards

governance.description: Vote on protocol proposals, fee distribution, and strategic decisions

rewards.description: Earn a share of protocol fees proportional to your veQS balance

boost.title: Boosted Yields
boost.description: Get up to 2.5x boost on liquidity mining and staking rewards

security.title: Network Security
security.description: Help secure the network by aligning incentives long-term

decay.title: Understanding veQS Decay
decay.description: Your veQS balance decreases linearly over time until it reaches zero at the end of your lock period. This incentivizes long-term commitment.
decay.visualAriaLabel: Visualization of veQS decay from full to zero
decay.note: You can extend your lock at any time to restore full veQS balance

meta.title: FAQ | Token Hub | Quantum Shield
meta.description: Frequently asked questions about QS tokens, veQS, locking, and governance

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about Token Hub, veQS, and governance

what_is_token_hub.question: What is Token Hub?
what_is_token_hub.answer: Token Hub is the governance and staking platform for Quantum Shield protocol. It allows you to lock QS tokens to receive veQS (voting escrow QS), participate in governance voting, and earn protocol rewards.

who_can_participate.question: Who can participate in Token Hub?
who_can_participate.answer: Anyone who holds QS tokens can participate. You need a compatible Web3 wallet (like MetaMask, WalletConnect) and QS tokens to get started.

is_it_safe.question: Is it safe to lock my tokens?
is_it_safe.answer: The smart contracts have been audited by leading security firms. However, as with any DeFi protocol, there are inherent risks. Locked tokens cannot be withdrawn until the lock period ends. Please do your own research before participating.

how_to_lock.question: How do I lock my QS tokens?
how_to_lock.answer: Go to the Lock page, enter the amount of QS you want to lock, select your lock duration (6 months to 4 years), review the preview, and confirm the transaction in your wallet.

minimum_amount.question: Is there a minimum lock amount?
minimum_amount.answer: There is no minimum amount for locking QS tokens. However, gas fees may make very small amounts economically impractical.

can_unlock_early.question: Can I unlock my tokens early?
can_unlock_early.answer: No, locked tokens cannot be withdrawn before the lock period ends. This is by design to ensure long-term commitment and stability in governance. Please carefully consider your lock duration before confirming.

extend_lock.question: Can I extend my lock period?
extend_lock.answer: Yes, you can extend your lock at any time. Extending your lock will recalculate your veQS balance based on the new lock duration, restoring your voting power.

what_is_veqs.question: What is veQS?
what_is_veqs.answer: veQS (voting escrow QS) is a non-transferable token that represents your governance power and reward share. It is calculated based on how much QS you lock and for how long.

how_calculated.question: How is veQS calculated?
how_calculated.answer: veQS = QS × (lock_period / 4 years). For example, locking 10,000 QS for 2 years gives you 5,000 veQS. Locking for the maximum 4 years gives you a 1:1 ratio.

why_decay.question: Why does veQS decay over time?
why_decay.answer: veQS decays linearly until it reaches zero at the end of your lock period. This incentivizes long-term commitment and allows governance power to naturally shift to active, committed participants.

non_transferable.question: Can I transfer my veQS to another wallet?
non_transferable.answer: No, veQS is non-transferable and bound to your wallet address. This prevents vote buying and ensures governance power remains with genuine long-term stakeholders.

what_is_governance.question: What is governance voting?
what_is_governance.answer: Governance voting allows veQS holders to vote on protocol proposals, including fee adjustments, parameter changes, treasury allocations, and strategic decisions.

how_to_vote.question: How do I vote on proposals?
how_to_vote.answer: Connect your wallet to the Governance portal, browse active proposals, review the details, and cast your vote. Your voting power is proportional to your veQS balance at the time of voting.

proposal_types.question: What types of proposals can be voted on?
proposal_types.answer: Proposals can include protocol parameter changes, fee distribution adjustments, treasury fund allocations, strategic partnerships, and protocol upgrades. Anyone with sufficient veQS can submit proposals.

voting_power.question: How is my voting power determined?
voting_power.answer: Your voting power is directly proportional to your veQS balance. More veQS means more influence in governance decisions. You can also delegate your voting power to trusted delegates.

how_rewards_work.question: How do rewards work?
how_rewards_work.answer: Protocol fees are distributed to veQS holders proportionally to their veQS balance. The more veQS you hold, the larger your share of protocol rewards.

when_distributed.question: When are rewards distributed?
when_distributed.answer: Rewards are distributed at the end of each epoch (typically weekly). You can claim accumulated rewards from the Rewards page at any time.

claim_process.question: How do I claim my rewards?
claim_process.answer: Go to the Rewards page, view your claimable balance, and click the Claim button. Confirm the transaction in your wallet to receive your rewards.

reward_boost.question: What is reward boost?
reward_boost.answer: veQS holders can receive up to 2.5x boost on liquidity mining and other protocol rewards. The boost amount depends on your veQS balance relative to your staking position.

notice.title: Important Notice
notice.description: This FAQ is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice. Please do your own research and understand the risks before participating.

getQS.title: How to Get QS Tokens
getQS.description: Explore different ways to acquire QS tokens and start participating in Token Hub governance.

dex.title: Buy on DEX
dex.description: Purchase QS tokens on decentralized exchanges using ETH or stablecoins. The most direct way to acquire QS.

rewards.title: Earn Protocol Rewards
rewards.description: Earn QS tokens by participating in governance, providing liquidity, or staking. Rewards are distributed weekly.

airdrop.title: Airdrops
airdrop.description: Early adopters and active community members may receive QS airdrops. Check announcements for eligibility criteria.

staking.title: Staking Rewards
staking.description: Stake supported assets to earn QS rewards. Higher APY for longer commitment periods.

dex.title: Buy on Decentralized Exchanges
dex.subtitle: Recommended exchanges where QS is listed

howToBuy.title: How to Buy QS
howToBuy.step1: Connect your wallet to the DEX (MetaMask, WalletConnect, etc.)
howToBuy.step2: Select ETH or USDC as the input token
howToBuy.step3: Enter QS as the output token or paste the contract address
howToBuy.step4: Review the transaction and confirm in your wallet

contract.title: Official Token Contract
contract.subtitle: Always verify you are using the correct contract address

warning.title: Important
warning.description: Only use the official contract address. Verify on Etherscan before making any transactions. Never trust links from unofficial sources.

votingPowerTooltip.title: What is Voting Power?
votingPowerTooltip.description: Voting Power represents how much influence your vote has in Quantum Shield's governance (decision-making on operational policies). The more veQS you have, the higher your voting power.

meta.title: Delegate List | Token Hub | Quantum Shield
meta.description: Delegate your veQS to trusted delegates and leverage voting power

delegateList.title: Delegate List
delegateList.subtitle: Delegate your veQS to trusted delegates and leverage voting power

delegates.watanabeBio: Early supporter of Quantum Shield. Prioritizes security and long-term protocol development. Votes always favor community interests.
delegates.satoBio: Blockchain researcher. Focuses on technical improvement proposals for the protocol. Supports transparent decision-making.
delegates.tanakaBio: DeFi protocol expert. Supports proposals that balance yield optimization with risk management.
delegates.yamamotoBio: Infrastructure operator prioritizing protocol stability. Votes from a technical perspective based on node operation experience.
delegates.suzukiBio: Cryptography researcher. Votes to ensure technical accuracy of quantum resistance. Supports strict adherence to CP principles.
delegates.matsumotoBio: Community builder. Leverages DAO governance experience to promote inclusive and fair decision-making processes.

tooltip.title: What is Delegation?
tooltip.description: Delegation means entrusting your veQS voting rights to someone you trust. Your tokens (QS) don't move when you delegate - only your voting rights are exercised on your behalf.
tooltip.note: You can revoke delegation at any time. Your tokens will never decrease.

participationTooltip.description: Voting participation shows how actively this delegate has voted on past proposals. Higher rates mean they're more likely to vote consistently on your behalf.

empty.title: No delegates found
empty.description: Try adjusting your search or clearing filters

footer.disclaimer: This is not investment advice. Delegation transfers voting rights, not tokens. Review delegate voting history and choose carefully.

rewards.title: Rewards
rewards.subtitle: View and claim your rewards as a veQS holder

apyTooltip.title: What is APY?
apyTooltip.description: APY (Annual Percentage Yield) shows the expected annual return on your locked tokens. For example, 12.5% APY means locking 10,000 QS could earn about 1,250 QS in rewards per year.

epochTooltip.title: What is an Epoch?
epochTooltip.description: An epoch is a time period used for reward calculation. Typically one week long, rewards are calculated and distributed at the end of each epoch.

unlock.title: Unlock QS

stats.veqsTooltip: veQS (voting escrow QS) represents your voting power. It decreases as you approach the end of the lock period.

notice.noEarlyUnlock: Tokens cannot be withdrawn during the lock period. You must wait until the unlock date. This is by design to ensure long-term governance stability.

tooltip.label: About Unlocking
tooltip.title: How Unlocking Works
tooltip.description: QS tokens cannot be withdrawn until your selected lock period ends. After the lock period ends, you can withdraw your tokens from this page.
tooltip.note: Early unlock is not possible. Choose your lock period carefully. You can always extend your lock.
